body_txt: This is the state in which a person fails to reciprocate any romantic interest shown in them. The more the character is intended as Mr. Fanservice or Ms. Fanservice , the more likely this outcome will be. Sometimes it lasts even if the love interest says no , and sometimes the lover loses interest and gives up. Maybe the love interest eventually develops a crush on the lover, but then the lover suddenly loses interest . When fans support relationships that involve unrequited love, you're looking at Starboarding . This may be resolved — or, alternately, made even more awkward — if the unrequited makes their feelings known . The Ignored Enamored Underling may be working under someone Oblivious to Love . Some types of Love Triangles fall into this category. When the love interest is exceptionally unlikely to reciprocate, the lover becomes a Hopeless Suitor . As the series approaches the end, there may be Cleaning Up Romantic Loose Ends or even a Last-Minute Hookup . Can overlap with The Gentle Rejection .
